name: ag2-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for building AG2 agents and multi-agent workflows

plugins.name: ag2-agent-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffold new AG2 agents with proper structure, tool functions, and A2A server wiring

plugins.name: ag2-workflow-patterns
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration patterns: group chat, sequential, round-robin, and custom workflows

plugins.name: ag2-tool-builder
plugins.description: Create well-structured tool functions for AG2 agents with proper error handling and JSON contracts

plugins.name: ag2-agent-reviewer
plugins.description: Review AG2 agent code for common issues: prompt quality, tool contracts, error handling, and security

plugins.name: ag2-agent-guide
plugins.description: Agent-based advisors for AG2 architecture decisions, pattern selection, and system prompt engineering

plugins.name: ag2-brand-guidelines
plugins.description: AG2 design system and brand guidelines. Applies consistent visual identity to all generated UI code and artifacts.
